scene_title: Amostras de liga metalica nao-humana em laboratorio
narrative_beat: Mesa de laboratorio subterraneo com amostras metalicas de forma impossivel em suportes de vidro

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a subterranean laboratory bench with three twisted metallic alloy samples in impossible organic curves, each displayed on glass stands
subject.focal_point: the central sample with its chrome surface catching amber light
subject.secondary: The samples look like frozen metal melted into impossible shapes. Each one reflects warm side lighting.
props: silver chrome alloy samples with impossible geometry

composition.rule: horizontal alignment of three specimens, rule of thirds
composition.foreground: metallic samples in rich chrome-gold tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white bunker walls with exposed cables

lighting.key_light: hard amber work light from lateral right
lighting.fill_light: faint cold blue backlight from instruments

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.secondary: three samples as triad of confirmation

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
